name: ai-autonomous-coding-loop
description: Production-grade AI SaaS monorepo for AI Autonomous Coding Loop platform

scripts.build: pnpm -F @repo/database build && pnpm -F @repo/ai-agents build && pnpm -F @repo/workflow build && pnpm -F @repo/mcp-workflow build && pnpm -F @repo/core-services build && pnpm -F @repo/ai-runtime build && pnpm -F @repo/cli build && pnpm -F web build
